requestor_information.certification_conviction_status: I HAVE NOT been convicted of an indictable offense

record_request_information.record_request_information_line_1: Pursuant to the New Jersey Open Public Records Act (OPRA), I am requesting electronic copies (PDF preferred) of the South Hunterdon Regional School District Board of Education meeting agendas and approved minutes for all regular and special public meetings held between 2024-07-01 and 2025-06-30, inclusive. Please include any attachments that are considered part of the official public agenda packets (e.g., presentations, reports, appendices) to the extent they are maintained in electronic form.
record_request_information.record_request_information_line_2: For the same date range (2024-07-01 through 2025-06-30), I am also requesting copies of the district’s annual budget documents as adopted by the Board, including: (a) the final adopted budget for the 2024–2025 school year; (b) any budget user-friendly summaries submitted to or published by the NJ Department of Education; and (c) any public budget presentations provided at Board meetings during this period that are maintained by the district (PowerPoints, PDFs, handouts, etc.).
record_request_information.record_request_information_line_3: Additionally, I request copies of any current contracts or agreements in effect during the 2024–2025 school year between the district and student transportation providers (e.g., Durham, First Student, or other bus companies), including base contract documents and any amendments or addenda that change pricing, routes, or service levels. I am particularly interested in contracts related to daily home-to-school transportation for general education students residing in Lambertville, West Amwell, and Stockton.
record_request_information.record_request_information_line_4: To better understand recent changes in transportation routes and pick-up times, I also request any written correspondence maintained by the district from 2024-08-01 to 2024-10-31 between the Business Administrator or Transportation Coordinator and contracted transportation vendors that specifically references: route consolidations, stop eliminations or relocations, changes to morning pick-up windows, or changes to after-school activity bus runs. This may include letters, memoranda, or emails; I am not seeking any student-identifying information and am comfortable with appropriate redactions to protect student privacy.
record_request_information.record_request_information_line_5: If any of the requested records are already publicly available on the district website or another public portal, please feel free to satisfy this request by providing the exact URLs and, if possible, indicating which documents correspond to which portion of this request. I am not seeking the creation of new records—only existing records in whatever format they are currently maintained, with a preference for electronic formats to reduce copying costs and expedite delivery.
record_request_information.record_request_information_line_6: If any portion of this request is unclear or would be easier to fulfill if narrowed, I am happy to clarify or reasonably modify the scope. Please advise in advance if you anticipate that the cost will exceed my maximum authorization below, or if any portion of this request will be denied or requires additional time under OPRA so I can decide how to proceed.
